name: nOps AWS Cloud Optimization API
what_it_does: AWS-specialized cloud cost optimization platform with REST API — automatically managing Spot instances for workloads, optimizing Reserved Instance and Savings Plan coverage, providing cloud cost visibility and recommendations, and reducing AWS costs through automated commitment management and Spot interruption handling.
use_cases: Querying AWS cost optimization recommendations and realized savings via API
Monitoring Spot instance coverage and interruption events for engineering dashboards
Pulling Savings Plan coverage analysis for commitment optimization decisions
Integrating nOps rightsizing recommendations with infrastructure automation pipelines
Automating monthly AWS cost reporting for engineering team budget accountability
not_for: General-purpose cloud cost reporting without optimization focus
best_when: An AWS-primary engineering team wants automated Spot instance management with interruption handling, Savings Plan optimization, and actionable cost reduction recommendations without manual analysis.
avoid_when: You're multi-cloud (use CloudCheckr or Vantage), run on GCP or Azure, or don't have engineering workloads that benefit from Spot instances.

auth.notes: API key from nOps account settings. Passed as X-Nops-Api-Key header. Account-scoped access. Webhook for Spot interruption alerts and optimization recommendations. No OAuth2. AWS cross-account IAM role required for nOps to access billing data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of savings generated (success fee model); typically 15-20% of savings
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2018. Raised $30M+. Success-fee pricing model — you only pay when they save you money. Free tier for small AWS spenders. Spot instance automation via nSure (guaranteed availability SLA on Spot). Kubernetes node optimization. Savings Plan and Reserved Instance management.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for recommendations, savings, Spot status, and commitments. X-Nops-Api-Key header. Good documentation. AWS cross-account role required before data is available. Spot automation requires nOps agent deployment in AWS account. Webhook for Spot interruption events enables automated workload migration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Recommendation reads fully idempotent. Savings reads idempotent by time period. Spot status reads idempotent. Commitment reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: AWS cross-account IAM role required — nOps needs Billing Account reader permissions
Spot automation requires nOps nSure agent deployed in AWS — API alone insufficient
Success-fee pricing model — API integration cost is function of savings generated
AWS cost data has 24-48 hour latency from AWS Cost and Usage Reports
X-Nops-Api-Key header (not Authorization) — non-standard header name

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. X-Nops-Api-Key header auth. AWS cross-account IAM role is privileged access — implement least privilege. Spot automation agent has EC2 management permissions — review scope. Success fee model creates transparency in value delivered.
